faqs.question: How much does carpenter ant control cost in Travis?
faqs.answer: Carpenter ant control in Travis typically ranges from $350 to $2,000, depending on the severity of the infestation, colony size, and the number of treatment areas required. Larger homes near wooded areas or properties with multiple satellite colonies may require more extensive treatment, while early-stage infestations can often be addressed at the lower end of the pricing range.

faqs.question: Why are carpenter ants so common in Travis, Staten Island?
faqs.answer: Travis's proximity to the William T. Davis Wildlife Refuge and abundant tree coverage creates ideal conditions for carpenter ants. The neighborhood's moisture-rich environment, aging trees, and wooden structures provide perfect nesting sites. Many Travis homes also have wood-to-soil contact points and moisture issues that attract these wood-destroying insects.

faqs.question: How quickly can you treat a carpenter ant problem in Travis?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and next-day service to Travis residents in most cases. Initial treatment typically takes 1-3 hours depending on your property size and infestation severity. Most carpenter ant problems require follow-up visits over 2-4 weeks to ensure complete colony elimination, as these pests often establish multiple nesting sites throughout a property.

faqs.question: Are carpenter ants damaging my Travis home right now?
faqs.answer: If you've noticed large black ants, especially near windows, doors, or in your basement, carpenter ants may already be damaging your home's wooden structures. Unlike termites, carpenter ants excavate wood to create smooth galleries for nesting. Signs include sawdust piles, rustling sounds in walls, and winged ants in spring. We provide free inspections to Travis homeowners to assess damage and recommend treatment.
